connectors.name: Slack
connectors.description: Send and receive Slack messages, post to channels, manage threads, and react to workspace events — all through the HeadyIO Slack connector with OAuth bot and user token support.

connectors.name: Discord
connectors.description: Post messages, create threads, manage webhooks, and respond to Discord events. Supports both bot token and webhook-based integration modes for flexible deployment.

connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.description: React to GitHub events — pushes, pull requests, issues, reviews, and deployments — and trigger automated Heady™ agent workflows based on repository activity.

connectors.name: Notion
connectors.description: Read and write Notion databases, pages, and blocks. Sync Heady™ agent outputs directly into your Notion workspace and trigger workflows when Notion content changes.

connectors.name: Airtable
connectors.description: Bi-directional sync with Airtable bases and tables. Write agent outputs to records, trigger pipelines on record creation or update, and query Airtable data as agent context.

connectors.name: Zapier
connectors.description: Connect Heady™ to 5,000+ apps through Zapier's automation network. Use HeadyIO as a Zapier trigger or action to integrate AI intelligence into any existing Zap workflow.

connectors.name: Stripe
connectors.description: Process Stripe webhooks for payment events — charges, subscriptions, invoices, and disputes. Route payment intelligence to Heady™ agents for automated financial workflows.

connectors.name: Twilio
connectors.description: Send SMS, MMS, and WhatsApp messages through Twilio. Receive inbound messages and route them to Heady™ agents for AI-powered conversational SMS experiences.

connectors.name: SendGrid
connectors.description: Send transactional and marketing emails through SendGrid. Process inbound email parse webhooks to route email content into Heady™ workflows and agent pipelines.

connectors.name: Google Workspace
connectors.description: Integrate with Gmail, Google Drive, Google Calendar, and Google Docs. Trigger agents on email receipt, file changes, or calendar events using Google's Pub/Sub event infrastructure.

connectors.name: HubSpot
connectors.description: Sync contacts, deals, and tickets with HubSpot CRM. Trigger AI workflows on pipeline changes, contact activity, and deal stage transitions for intelligent CRM automation.

connectors.name: Linear
connectors.description: React to Linear issue creation, status changes, and cycle completions. Route engineering team activity to Heady™ agents for automated standup summaries, prioritization, and sprint analysis.
